audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass is good for: Daytime Mansion Tour admission for two adults at $5 per person, and two children free One Take-a-Walk bag rental at $2/hr Story Time for two children at $5 per child, and an accompanying adult free For available dates and times, please visit goreplace.org/w
